data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that an email copy is auto-sent to the signatory. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality, such as API reads or state checks demonstrating that the email is indeed sent upon signature capture. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but without concrete evidence, it is clear that there is a gap in the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of email functionality to confirm that an email copy is auto-sent to the signatory.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for email sending functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the email copy is sent to the signatory.
